title: pediculariopsis verticillata
intro: Pediculariopsis verticillata, also known as 'False Buttonbush', is a flowering plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Pediculariopsis verticillata include its ability to aid in the healing of skin irritations, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
